mapper.select: SELECT po.id , po.code , GROUP_CONCAT(p.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS products , po.total_amount , po.status , po.created_at , po.requested_delivery_date FROM purchase_order po JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON po.id = pop.purchase_order_id JOIN product p ON pop.product_id = p.id WHERE po.status = '임시저장' GROUP BY po.id, po.code, po.total_amount, po.status, po.created_at, po.requested_delivery_date ORDER BY po.created_at DESC

SELECT po.id , po.code , s.name AS supplierName , po.total_amount AS totalAmount , po.created_at AS createdAt FROM purchase_order po JOIN supplier s ON po.supplier_id = s.id JOIN user u ON u.id = po.user_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND po.status = '발주 대기' ORDER BY po.created_at
